items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian.md for styling codeblocks and inline code
items.title: mayurankv/Obsidian-Code-Styler: A plugin for Obsidian.md for styling codeblocks and inline code

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds a menu entry to its search view for copying the Obsidian search URL.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-copy-search-url: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds a menu entry to its search view for copying the Obsidian search URL.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that ensures each note occupies only one tab. If a note is already open, its existing tab will be focussed instead of opening the same file in the current tab.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-mononote: An Obsidian plugin that ensures each note occupies only one tab. If a note is already open, its existing tab will be focussed instead of opening the same file in the current tab.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds commands for increasing/decreasing the blockquote level of the current line or selection(s).
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-blockquote-levels: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds commands for increasing/decreasing the blockquote level of the current line or selection(s).

items.content_html: A simple Obsidian plugin that proxies `console.*()` calls and copies log messages and uncaught exceptions to a note.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-logstravaganza: A simple Obsidian plugin that proxies `console.*()` calls and copies log messages and uncaught exceptions to a note.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that enables you to easily adjust the editor's line width on a note-by-note basis.
items.title: 0skater0/obsidian-custom-note-width: A plugin for Obsidian that enables you to easily adjust the editor's line width on a note-by-note basis.

items.content_html: Obsidian cron / schedular plugin to schedule automatic execution of commands
items.title: cdloh/obsidian-cron: Obsidian cron / schedular plugin to schedule automatic execution of commands

items.content_html: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.
items.title: RafaelGB/Obsidian-ZettlelFlow: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.

items.content_html: A plugin that can query multiple APIs for movies, series, anime, games, music and wiki articles, and import them into your vault.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-media-db-plugin: A plugin that can query multiple APIs for movies, series, anime, games, music and wiki articles, and import them into your vault.

items.content_html: Opsidian plugin to keep track of all expiration dates, for example, for your groceries.
items.title: Raboro/obsidian-expiration-date-tracker-plugin: Opsidian plugin to keep track of all expiration dates, for example, for your groceries.

items.content_html: Create forms that modify data in existing notes; the dataview plugin for data entry.
items.title: waynevanson/data-entry-obsidian-plugin: Create forms that modify data in existing notes; the dataview plugin for data entry.

items.content_html: Plugin that adds features to tables in obsidian including merging, vertical headers, and custom css
items.title: NicoNekoru/obsidan-advanced-table-xt: Plugin that adds features to tables in obsidian including merging, vertical headers, and custom css

items.title: Vaccarini-Lorenzo/iCalObsidianSync: An obsidian plugin that exploit a natural language processing engine to find potential events and sync them with iCalendar

items.content_html: tag explorer and frontmatter logger plugin for obsidian
items.title: loftTech/obsidian-oblogger: tag explorer and frontmatter logger plugin for obsidian

items.content_html: 🔁 Enable/disable your Obsidian plugins directly using toggle buttons in the settings right-side menu.
